test.create_query: CREATE TABLE dedup_null ( id UInt32, datetime DateTime, category LowCardinality(String), value1 UInt64, value2 UInt32, value3 UInt16, ts1 DateTime, counter1 UInt32, counter2 UInt32, counter3 UInt32, counter4 UInt32, counter5 UInt32, status UInt8 ) ENGINE = Null

CREATE TABLE dedup_mt ( id UInt32, datetime DateTime, category LowCardinality(String), value1 UInt64, value2 UInt32, value3 UInt16, ts1 DateTime, counter1 UInt32, counter2 UInt32, counter3 UInt32, counter4 UInt32, counter5 UInt32, status UInt8 ) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY () PARTITION BY toYYYYMMDD(datetime) SETTINGS non_replicated_deduplication_window = 1000
test.query: INSERT INTO dedup_null SELECT number, toDateTime('2024-01-01') + toIntervalSecond(number % 86400), ['a','b','c','d','e'][number % 5 + 1], rand(), number % 1000000, number % 65535, toDateTime('2024-01-01') + toIntervalSecond(number % 43200), number % 100000, number % 200000, number % 300000, number % 400000, number % 500000, number % 256 FROM numbers(5000000) ORDER BY ALL SETTINGS deduplicate_insert='{dedup_mode}'

INSERT INTO dedup_mt SELECT number, toDateTime('2024-01-01') + toIntervalSecond(number % 86400), ['a','b','c','d','e'][number % 5 + 1], rand(), number % 1000000, number % 65535, toDateTime('2024-01-01') + toIntervalSecond(number % 43200), number % 100000, number % 200000, number % 300000, number % 400000, number % 500000, number % 256 FROM numbers(5000000) ORDER BY ALL SETTINGS deduplicate_insert='{dedup_mode}'
